rootCauseContract: Aider supports OpenAI-compatible endpoints directly, so a new transport bridge would duplicate the existing safe-lab Chat Completions contract.
regressionChecks: the official CLI runs from an immutable isolated venv
one-shot message mode exits without interactive input
git commits, analytics, update checks, browser tooling, and host history are disabled
all writable configuration and history paths remain inside the private workspace
no adapter-specific gateway path is introduced
